summary: Continued SysDolphin baselib TObj decompilation by matching several early TObj helper routines in C, moving associated data out of assembly where possible, and replacing many anonymous TObj-related symbols across assembly callsites with HSD_* names. The PR body explicitly says it matched up to MakeTextureMtx and labeled all remaining TObj functions. It also added GX texture map and post-transform texture matrix enums needed for typed TObj work.

key_files.reason: Added C implementations for HSD_TlutLoadDesc, HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc, _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType, and static HSD_TexMapID2PTTexMtx, plus an extern for tobj_head and moved the unexpected-texmap panic string into C.
Removed matched assembly for the newly decompiled functions, renamed many remaining labels/functions, renamed lbl_804D75AC to tobj_head, and connected internal references to the new symbol names.
Adjusted TObj header declarations, including HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc and _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType placement.
Added GXTexMapID and GXPTTexMtx enums, including GX_TEXMAP_NULL, GX_TEX_DISABLE, and GX_PTTEXMTX0 through GX_PTIDENTITY values.
Replaced anonymous func_8035xxxx comments with named TObj/ImageDesc helper names for project-wide symbol tracking.
Renamed the global variable comment lbl_804D75AC to tobj_head.
Updated callsites to named TObj helpers such as _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType, HSD_Index2TexMtx, and HSD_TObjGetNext.
Updated MObj callsites to named TObj setup/resource/free helpers.
Updated PObj callsites to named TObj current-by-type and texture matrix helpers.
Updated shadow cleanup callsites to HSD_ImageDescFree and HSD_TObjFree.

what_changed: Matched HSD_TlutLoadDesc in C: NULL input returns NULL; otherwise allocates HSD_Tlut via HSD_TlutAlloc, memcpy copies sizeof(HSD_Tlut), and returns the new object.
Matched HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc in C with the same allocate/copy/NULL pattern using HSD_TObjTevAlloc and sizeof(HSD_TObjTev).
Matched _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType in C: starts from global tobj_head when from is NULL, otherwise from->next, then walks next pointers until tobj_coord(tp) equals the requested mapping.
Added static HSD_TexMapID2PTTexMtx in C with cases GX_TEXMAP0 through GX_TEXMAP7 mapping to GX_PTTEXMTX0 through GX_PTTEXMTX7, and an HSD_Panic fallback using the string "unexpected texmap id.\n".
Used #pragma push / #pragma force_active on / #pragma pop around HSD_TexMapID2PTTexMtx, indicating an intentional data/code retention tactic for matching.
Renamed the TObj global lbl_804D75AC to tobj_head in assembly and variables.h references.

Renamed many remaining TObj assembly functions from anonymous func_8035xxxx/func_8036xxxx names to semantic names such as TObjSetupMtx, HSD_TObjSetupTextureCoordGen, HSD_TObjSetupVolatileTev, MakeColorGenTExp, HSD_TObjAssignResources, HSD_TObjSetup, HSD_TexCoordID2TexGenSrc, HSD_Index2TexCoord, HSD_Index2TexMtx, HSD_Index2TexMap, HSD_TObjRemoveAll, HSD_TObjGetNext, HSD_TObjFree, HSD_TlutAlloc, HSD_TObjTevAlloc, HSD_ImageDescFree, and HSD_ImageDescCopyFromEFB.
Renamed internal local labels for class hooks and helpers, including MakeTextureMtx, TObjRelease, and TObjAmnesia, and updated TObjInfoInit to refer to those names.
Updated many external assembly callsites in ft, gm, it, lb, text_2, mobj, pobj, and shadow files to call the new symbol names instead of anonymous func_* names.
Added GXTexMapID and GXPTTexMtx enum definitions to include/dolphin/gx/gxtypes.h to support named texture-map and post-transform texture-matrix constants.
smart_moves: Started the C migration with small, structurally simple allocation/load helpers, which are easy to match because their behavior is mostly NULL checks, allocator calls, memcpy size constants, and return flow.
Renamed callsites across unrelated systems in the same PR, making the new TObj semantics immediately searchable from fighter, item, game, text, MObj, PObj, and shadow assembly.
Introduced GX enum names before/while using them in TObj code, avoiding unexplained magic constants for texture-map and PTTEXMTX IDs.
Converted the global current TObj list head from lbl_804D75AC to tobj_head, clarifying the role of the global used by HSD_TObjSetup, _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType, and TObjAmnesia.
Moved the panic string and texmap-to-PTTexMtx helper data into C with force_active, preserving required emitted data while reducing assembly burden.
Kept unmatched larger routines in assembly but gave them meaningful names, which improves later matching without requiring all logic to be decompiled at once.
decomp_lessons: For baselib object loaders, look for the pattern: if descriptor is non-NULL, allocate the runtime object, memcpy the descriptor into it using the exact struct size, and return it; otherwise return NULL.
When a function traverses an intrusive linked list and accepts an optional starting node, NULL often means start at a global head while non-NULL means continue at from->next.

Renaming a global variable is especially valuable when multiple not-yet-matched assembly routines share it; here tobj_head documents the current TObj list state across setup and amnesia/release logic.
Header enum work can be a matching enabler: GX_TEXMAP* and GX_PTTEXMTX* names encode the exact constants used by TObj texture-matrix helpers.
Function naming can precede full decompilation. Even when bodies remain in asm, updating labels and callsites establishes semantic anchors for future work.
For small static helpers with switch statements and associated jump/data tables, #pragma force_active can be necessary to keep emitted code/data aligned with the original binary.
Project-wide callsite relabeling after a match is not just cleanup; it validates that the same address is used consistently across gameplay, rendering, and baselib systems.
naming_conventions: Public HAL/SysDolphin texture-object APIs use the HSD_TObj* prefix, for example HSD_TObjSetup, HSD_TObjFree, HSD_TObjRemoveAll, and HSD_TObjGetNext.
Internal or lower-level TObj helpers may retain non-HSD names such as TObjSetupMtx, MakeTextureMtx, MakeColorGenTExp, TObjRelease, and TObjAmnesia.
The current-by-type helper was named _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType with a leading underscore, suggesting an internal/private HSD-style function.
Image descriptor helpers use HSD_ImageDesc* names, such as HSD_ImageDescFree and HSD_ImageDescCopyFromEFB.
Texture index conversion helpers use HSD_Index2* and HSD_TexCoordID2* patterns: HSD_Index2TexCoord, HSD_Index2TexMtx, HSD_Index2TexMap, HSD_TexCoordID2TexGenSrc.
The former global lbl_804D75AC was renamed to the descriptive lower_snake_case tobj_head.
GX enum types follow Dolphin SDK style names: GXTexMapID and GXPTTexMtx, with values such as GX_TEXMAP0, GX_TEXMAP_NULL, GX_TEX_DISABLE, GX_PTTEXMTX0, and GX_PTIDENTITY.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Removed the assembly bodies for HSD_TlutLoadDesc, HSD_TObjTevLoadDesc, and _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType after matching them in C.
Left MakeTextureMtx and many larger TObj routines in assembly but renamed their global labels, reducing future ambiguity without overextending the match.
Updated assembly branches/calls across many files from func_* to the new names while preserving addresses and instruction bytes in comments.
Used exact sizeof-based memcpy patterns in C for descriptor loaders: sizeof(HSD_Tlut) and sizeof(HSD_TObjTev), corresponding to the old assembly copy sizes 0x10 and 0x20.
Represented texmap-to-PTTexMtx mapping as a switch over GXTexMapID values; this matches the old branch-table style code and allows the associated panic path to be expressed in C.
Used #pragma force_active around the static HSD_TexMapID2PTTexMtx helper, likely to force emission of otherwise unreferenced code/data needed for binary layout.
Moved the string "unexpected texmap id.\n" out of tobj.s data into C near the helper that uses it.
Repointed tobj.s references from lbl_804D75AC@sda21 to tobj_head@sda21, keeping the small-data access pattern intact while improving symbol naming.

review_feedback.note: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that decompile MakeTextureMtx or TObjSetupMtx after PR #256.
Find PRs touching tobj_head or _HSD_TObjGetCurrentByType to see whether the global list model was refined.
Search for later updates to GXTexMapID or GXPTTexMtx definitions to confirm enum completeness and SDK naming accuracy.
Look for follow-up matches of HSD_Index2TexCoord, HSD_Index2TexMtx, HSD_Index2TexMap, and HSD_TexCoordID2TexGenSrc.
Search for PRs that replace remaining TObj assembly in asm/sysdolphin/baselib/tobj.s with C.
Find uses of #pragma force_active in later SysDolphin matches to compare data-retention tactics.
